machines.notes: 打开浏览器登录Google账号即可使用Cloud Shell，5GB持久存储
打开Cloud Shell后粘贴部署脚本即可获得完整桌面
deploy_log: [4/4] 部署脚本已生成(在web_url中执行)

machines.notes: 用GitHub账号(≥180天)登录ClawCloud，创建应用粘贴Docker配置
machines.deployScript:
# 🌱 GBTxiaotudou ClawCloud Docker桌面
# 在ClawCloud Run中粘贴此配置
services:
  desktop:
    image: kasmweb/desktop:1.15.0
    ports:
      - "6901:6901"
    environment:
      - VNC_PW=gbtxiaotudou
    shm_size: "512m"
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          cpus: "2"
          memory: 4G
deployLog: [4/4] Docker Compose配置已生成: Kasm桌面

machines.notes: 创建Docker Space，使用Dockerfile部署桌面
machines.deployScript:
# 🌱 GBTxiaotudou HuggingFace Space 桌面
FROM ubuntu:22.04
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    xfce4 xfce4-goodies firefox novnc websockify \
    x11vnc xvfb supervisor && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/desktop.conf
EXPOSE 6080
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord"]

# --- supervisord.conf (同目录创建) ---
# [supervisord]
# nodaemon=true
# [program:xvfb]
# command=Xvfb :1 -screen 0 1280x720x24
# [program:xfce]
# command=startxfce4
# environment=DISPLAY=":1"
# [program:vnc]
# command=x11vnc -display :1 -nopw -listen localhost -xkb
# [program:novnc]
# command=websockify --web=/usr/share/novnc/ 6080 localhost:5900
